 The India’s are known for slavish following of the
western culture. We are very good in imitation. Even
though India is a conservative many Indians have taken to
the western ways. The reason is rahu in the first house
leads to different kind of thinking.
Why Indians love to imitate the West - by K Gopalakrishnan
Flicking scenes, music tunes and story from foreign media is not new to India. We
have seen Sadak’s Sanjay Dutt enacting Mel Gibson of Lethal Weapon, we have heard
Anu Malik using Shaggy’s tune, and we have witnessed Karishma Kapoor getting into
legal problems for stealing intellectual property of Barbara! None has to be blamed
for this. Indian chart has a funny combination of planets, which will influence Indians
to imitate the West!
ASTROLOGICAL ANALYSIS
